2020 America Votes to Make Politics Boring Again Donald Trump promised the country a roller-coaster ride, and he overdelivered. This week, voters picked an old-school pol who promised to let them off. By Michael Grunwald - POLITICO

2020 Donald Trump Confronts a New Label: Loser For the first time in a life that has been free of consequences for his failures, Trump has been held to account on the world’s largest stage. By Michael Kruse - POLITICO

2020 ‘Harris Has the Potential To Change the Face of U.S. Politics’ What difference will Kamala Harris actually make when she takes office? From justice reform to immigration, 25 experts lay out the concrete impact a pioneering vice president could have. By POLITICO Magazine - POLITICO

2020 How Misfortune—and Stunning Luck—Brought Joe Biden to the Presidency A life marked by missteps and personal tragedy has also been buoyed by a series of remarkably fortuitous events. And the combination hit the moment just right. By Michael Kruse - POLITICO
